commands.review_summary:
This PR threads steered inbound-audio metadata through active embedded-run queueing and reply operation state so final TTS can synthesize voice after accepted steered audio without persisting session state.

PR surface: Source +28, Tests +109. Total +137 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the audio fact is computed before steering, dropped in the active steer queue call, and final TTS still gates from the original text context; no live WhatsApp timing repro was run.
